# INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.videoCallUnsupported

**Case**

The app doesn’t support video calls.

## Declaration

```swift
case videoCallUnsupported
```

## Constants

- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.microphoneNotAccessible**: The microphone isn’t accessible.
- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.cameraNotAccessible**: The camera isn’t accessible.
title: INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.videoCallUnsupported
